calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition For Order Approving Transfer Of Life Insurance Proceeds To Custodian Under California Uniform Transfers To Minors Act
Off Calendar Oct-14-2024 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hilary Pierce appeared by zoom for petitioner.

Discussion was held regarding the court not being comfortable with taking the route of allowing a CUTMA account over a guardianship of the estate, the court's responsibility to protect the minor's assets, Mrs. Pierce's client being a very experienced investor, the petitioner filing for guardianship of the estate, the court's ability to broaden the guardians authority with regard to investment decisions, etc. The Petition for Order Approving Transfer of Life Insurance Proceeds to Custodian Under California Uniform Transfers to Minors Act is denied.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Saenz. Not reported.

PETITION Petition For Order Approving Transfer Of Life Insurance Proceeds To Custodian Under California Uniform Transfers To Minors Act
Off Calendar Aug-12-2024 Continued To Oct-14-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
